## Summary

Describe the error family, source update, script change, or documentation change.

## Change Type

- [ ] Code / script behavior
- [ ] Documentation / guide content
- [ ] Evidence data / source mapping
- [ ] Release / version governance

## Version Impact

- [ ] None: editorial, redaction, or internal-only change
- [ ] Patch: bug fix, evidence correction, or compatible documentation fix
- [ ] Minor: new case, new diagnostic behavior, new script option, or new public workflow
- [ ] Major: breaking change to a documented script, output, case ID, or workflow

## Coupled Updates

- [ ] Documentation updated, or not needed because:
- [ ] Code updated, or not needed because:
- [ ] Changelog updated, or not needed because:
- [ ] Version file update deferred to a release PR, or updated in this PR

## Evidence

- Evidence level: A / B / C / D
- Related upstream issue(s):
- Dogfood level: L0 / L1 / L2

## Redaction Checklist

- [ ] No API keys, tokens, cookies, or credentials
- [ ] No private repository names or remotes
- [ ] No home directory paths or usernames
- [ ] No raw `.codex` session JSONL files
- [ ] No unredacted crash dumps or personal screenshots

## Verification

List commands run, or explain why the change is documentation-only.
